title: Luscious Thai Tofu Curry
description: A creamy, cilantro‑infused tofu curry that feels indulgent yet stays light and vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger; sauté until the onion becomes translucent, about 3‑4 minutes.
Stir in the red curry paste and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the tofu cubes, bell pepper, carrot, and zucchini, and simmer for 10 minutes until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Season with soy sauce, brown sugar, and a pinch of salt; stir in the lime juice and chopped parsley just before serving.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then serve hot over steamed jasmine rice or with warm naan.
Allow the curry to sit for 5 minutes; the flavors will deepen while the tofu soaks up the sauce.
